generic.title: We hit an unexpected error
generic.body: Try again, or return home if the problem persists.

global.title: Something went wrong
global.body: The app encountered a critical error.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.platformBody: On <localhost>localhost</localhost> this URL is the Olune platform — not a studio website. Your public pages live on your studio subdomain.
notFound.studioBody: This page hasn't been published yet, or the URL is wrong. Check spelling and publish status in the admin Website tab.
